headline: PPG livery to return for nine races during Team Penske's 60th anniversary season
summary: PITTSBURGH & MOORESVILLE, N.C., March 10, 2026--PPG (NYSE: PPG) and Team Penske today announced that the iconic PPG livery will return for nine major races across the NTT® INDYCAR® SERIES and NASCAR® Cup Series as Team Penske celebrates its 60th anniversary. The PPG colors will be showcased with an expanded lineup of drivers from Team Penske, including Josef Newgarden, Scott McLaughlin and Austin Cindric. content.title: PPG livery to return for nine races during Team Penske's 60th anniversary season
content.summary: PITTSBURGH & MOORESVILLE, N.C., March 10, 2026--PPG (NYSE: PPG) and Team Penske today announced that the iconic PPG livery will return for nine major races across the NTT® INDYCAR® SERIES and NASCAR® Cup Series as Team Penske celebrates its 60th anniversary. The PPG colors will be showcased with an expanded lineup of drivers from Team Penske, including Josef Newgarden, Scott McLaughlin and Austin Cindric. In addition, Josh Berry will represent PPG with Wood Brothers Racing, which maintains a tec

thumbnail.caption: Josh Berry, driving the No. 21 PPG Ford Mustang Dark Horse for Wood Brothers Racing at the 2025 Brickyard 400, is set to return to the iconic race in 2026.

headline: PPG completes 200th dry docking using electrostatic application
summary: PITTSBURGH, March 10, 2026--PPG announced the completion of its 200th vessel dry docking using electrostatic application of marine fouling control coatings.

content.title: PPG completes 200th dry docking using electrostatic application
content.summary: PITTSBURGH, March 10, 2026--PPG announced the completion of its 200th vessel dry docking using electrostatic application of marine fouling control coatings.

thumbnail.caption: PPG completes 200th dry docking using electrostatic application, a breakthrough method that delivers significant sustainability gains for ship owners and yards.

headline: PPG introduces PPG AQUACRON WSP shop primers series for structural steel
summary: PITTSBURGH, March 10, 2026--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced the launch of PPG AQUACRON® Waterborne Shop Primers (WSP) for structural steel. This breakthrough technology is suitable for all climates and combines rapid curing with a smooth finish and low volatile organic compounds* (VOCs), delivering a balance of properties unmatched in existing waterborne primers.

content.title: PPG introduces PPG AQUACRON WSP shop primers series for structural steel
content.summary: PITTSBURGH, March 10, 2026--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced the launch of PPG AQUACRON® Waterborne Shop Primers (WSP) for structural steel. This breakthrough technology is suitable for all climates and combines rapid curing with a smooth finish and low volatile organic compounds* (VOCs), delivering a balance of properties unmatched in existing waterborne primers.

thumbnail.caption: PPG Aquacron WSP primers feature a water-resistant layer that minimizes the need for sandblasting and surface preparation before top-coat application and installation, leading to substantial savings in time, labor and cost.
